Experimental results on contact-rich manipulation tasks demonstrate improved task success rates and reduced operator workload compared to conventional teleoperation and shared-autonomy baselines, indicating that conservative value learning provides an effective mechanism for embedding failure awareness into bilateral teleoperation. Experimental videos are available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XDTsvzEkDRE
tldr: This paper introduces a failure-aware framework for bimanual teleoperation, using conservative value learning to provide haptic assistance that steers operators away from failure while preserving their intent, demonstrating improved success and reduced workload in contact-rich tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种面向双手动遥操作的故障感知框架，利用保守价值学习提供触觉辅助，引导操作员避开容易出错的操作，同时保留他们的意图。实验表明，在接触丰富的任务中，该方法提高了成功率并降低了操作员的工作量。
summary_zh: 高精度操作的遥操作受到严格的成功容差和复杂的接触动力学约束，这使得人类操作员在部分可观测性下难以预测即将发生的失败。本文提出了一种基于价值引导、具有故障意识的双臂遥操作框架，该框架在保持操作员持续控制权的同时，提供柔顺的触觉辅助。该框架完全通过包含成功和失败执行的异构离线遥操作数据进行训练。任务可行性被建模为通过保守价值学习获得的保守成功得分，从而产生在分布偏移下仍然可靠的风险敏感估计。在在线操作期间，学习到的成功得分调节辅助水平，而学习到的执行器提供修正运动方向。两者通过主端的关节空间阻抗接口集成，产生持续的引导，引导操作员远离易于失败的动作，而不会覆盖意图。在接触丰富的操作任务上的实验结果表明，与传统的遥操作和共享自主基线相比，任务成功率有所提高，操作员工作量有所减少，这表明保守价值学习提供了一种有效的机制，可以将故障意识嵌入到双边遥操作中。实验视频可在https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XDTsvzEkDRE 观看。

title: LLM-Based Behavior Tree Generation for Construction Machinery
summary: Earthwork operations are facing an increasing demand, while workforce aging and skill loss create a pressing need for automation. ROS2-TMS for Construction, a Cyber-Physical System framework designed to coordinate construction machinery, has been proposed for autonomous operation; however, its reliance on manually designed Behavior Trees (BTs) limits scalability, particularly in scenarios involving heterogeneous machine cooperation. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities for task planning and BT generation. However, most existing approaches remain confined to simulations or simple manipulators, with relatively few applications demonstrated in real-world contexts, such as complex construction sites involving multiple machines. This paper proposes an LLM-based workflow for BT generation, introducing synchronization flags to enable safe and cooperative operation. The workflow consists of two steps: high-level planning, where the LLM generates synchronization flags, and BT generation using structured templates. Safety is ensured by planning with parameters stored in the system database. The proposed method is validated in simulation and further demonstrated through real-world experiments, highlighting its potential to advance automation in civil engineering.
tldr: This paper presents an LLM-based workflow for generating Behavior Trees (BTs) for construction machinery, using synchronization flags to enable safe and cooperative operation, validated in simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的工作流程，用于生成施工机械的行为树（BT），使用同步标志来实现安全和协作操作，并在仿真和实际实验中进行了验证。
summary_zh: 土方施工作业面临日益增长的需求，而劳动力老龄化和技能流失给自动化带来了紧迫的需求。ROS2-TMS for Construction 是一个旨在协调施工机械的赛博物理系统框架，已被提出用于自主运行；然而，其对人工设计的行为树（BTs）的依赖限制了其可扩展性，尤其是在涉及异构机器协作的场景中。大型语言模型（LLMs）的最新进展为任务规划和BT生成提供了新的机会。然而，大多数现有方法仍局限于模拟或简单的机械臂，在涉及多台机器的复杂施工现场等真实场景中的应用相对较少。本文提出了一种基于LLM的BT生成工作流程，引入同步标志以实现安全和协作操作。该工作流程包括两个步骤：高层规划，其中LLM生成同步标志；以及使用结构化模板生成BT。通过使用存储在系统数据库中的参数进行规划，确保安全性。所提出的方法通过仿真验证，并通过真实世界的实验进一步展示，突出了其在推进土木工程自动化方面的潜力。

title: Offline Discovery of Interpretable Skills from Multi-Task Trajectories
summary: Hierarchical Imitation Learning is a powerful paradigm for acquiring complex robot behaviors from demonstrations. A central challenge, however, lies in discovering reusable skills from long-horizon, multi-task offline data, especially when the data lacks explicit rewards or subtask annotations. In this work, we introduce LOKI, a three-stage end-to-end learning framework designed for offline skill discovery and hierarchical imitation. The framework commences with a two-stage, weakly supervised skill discovery process: Stage one performs coarse, task-aware macro-segmentation by employing an alignment-enforced Vector Quantized VAE guided by weak task labels. Stage two then refines these segments at a micro-level using a self-supervised sequential model, followed by an iterative clustering process to consolidate skill boundaries. The third stage then leverages these precise boundaries to construct a hierarchical policy within an option-based framework-complete with a learned termination condition beta for explicit skill switching. LOKI achieves high success rates on the challenging D4RL Kitchen benchmark and outperforms standard HIL baselines. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the discovered skills are semantically meaningful, aligning with human intuition, and exhibit compositionality by successfully sequencing them to solve a novel, unseen task.
tldr: The paper introduces LOKI, a three-stage framework for offline skill discovery and hierarchical imitation learning from multi-task trajectories, demonstrating its effectiveness on the D4RL Kitchen benchmark and in composing skills for novel tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LOKI，一个三阶段框架，用于从多任务轨迹中离线发现技能并进行分层模仿学习，并在D4RL Kitchen基准测试和组合技能以解决新任务方面展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 分层模仿学习是从演示中获取复杂机器人行为的强大范例。然而，一个核心挑战在于从长程、多任务离线数据中发现可重用技能，尤其是在数据缺乏明确奖励或子任务标注的情况下。在本工作中，我们提出LOKI，一个三阶段端到端学习框架，旨在用于离线技能发现和分层模仿。该框架始于一个两阶段的弱监督技能发现过程：第一阶段通过采用受对齐约束的向量量化变分自编码器（Vector Quantized VAE）来进行粗略的、任务感知的宏观分割，该自编码器由弱任务标签引导。第二阶段随后使用自监督序列模型在微观层面细化这些分割，然后通过迭代聚类过程来整合技能边界。第三阶段则利用这些精确的边界，在基于选项的框架内构建分层策略——包括一个用于显式技能切换的学习终止条件 beta。LOKI在具有挑战性的D4RL Kitchen基准测试中取得了很高的成功率，并且优于标准的分层模仿学习基线。此外，我们证明了所发现的技能在语义上是有意义的，与人类的直觉相符，并且通过成功地对它们进行排序以解决一项新颖的、未见过的任务，展现出可组合性。

title: Geometry-Aware Sampling-Based Motion Planning on Riemannian Manifolds
summary: In many robot motion planning problems, task objectives and physical constraints induce non-Euclidean geometry on the configuration space, yet many planners operate using Euclidean distances that ignore this structure. We address the problem of planning collision-free motions that minimize length under configuration-dependent Riemannian metrics, corresponding to geodesics on the configuration manifold. Conventional numerical methods for computing such paths do not scale well to high-dimensional systems, while sampling-based planners trade scalability for geometric fidelity. To bridge this gap, we propose a sampling-based motion planning framework that operates directly on Riemannian manifolds. We introduce a computationally efficient midpoint-based approximation of the Riemannian geodesic distance and prove that it matches the true Riemannian distance with third-order accuracy. Building on this approximation, we design a local planner that traces the manifold using first-order retractions guided by Riemannian natural gradients. Experiments on a two-link planar arm and a 7-DoF Franka manipulator under a kinetic-energy metric, as well as on rigid-body planning in $\mathrm{SE}(2)$ with non-holonomic motion constraints, demonstrate that our approach consistently produces lower-cost trajectories than Euclidean-based planners and classical numerical geodesic-solver baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel sampling-based motion planning framework that operates directly on Riemannian manifolds using a computationally efficient geodesic distance approximation, resulting in lower-cost trajectories compared to Euclidean-based planners.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的基于采样的运动规划框架，该框架直接在黎曼流形上运行，使用计算高效的测地距离近似，与基于欧几里德的规划器相比，可以产生更低成本的轨迹。
summary_zh: 在许多机器人运动规划问题中，任务目标和物理约束会在构型空间上诱导出非欧几里得几何，然而许多规划器仍使用忽略这种结构的欧几里得距离进行操作。我们致力于解决在构型相关的黎曼度量下，规划无碰撞运动并最小化路径长度的问题，这等价于在构型流形上寻找测地线。用于计算此类路径的传统数值方法无法很好地扩展到高维系统，而基于采样的规划器则以几何保真度换取可扩展性。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了一种直接在黎曼流形上运行的基于采样的运动规划框架。我们引入了一种计算效率高的基于中点的黎曼测地距离近似方法，并证明其可以达到三阶精度来匹配真实的黎曼距离。基于此近似，我们设计了一个局部规划器，该规划器利用黎曼自然梯度引导的一阶回撤来追踪流形。在动能度量下的一个双连杆平面臂和一个7自由度Franka机械臂，以及在具有非完整运动约束的$\mathrm{SE}(2)$中的刚体规划的实验表明，我们的方法始终比基于欧几里得的规划器和经典的数值测地线求解器基线产生更低成本的轨迹。

title: Navigating Simply, Aligning Deeply: Winning Solutions for Mouse vs. AI 2025
summary: Visual robustness and neural alignment remain critical challenges in developing artificial agents that can match biological vision systems. We present the winning approaches from Team HCMUS_TheFangs for both tracks of the NeurIPS 2025 Mouse vs. AI: Robust Visual Foraging Competition. For Track 1 (Visual Robustness), we demonstrate that architectural simplicity combined with targeted components yields superior generalization, achieving 95.4% final score with a lightweight two-layer CNN enhanced by Gated Linear Units and observation normalization. For Track 2 (Neural Alignment), we develop a deep ResNet-like architecture with 16 convolutional layers and GLU-based gating that achieves top-1 neural prediction performance with 17.8 million parameters. Our systematic analysis of ten model checkpoints trained between 60K to 1.14M steps reveals that training duration exhibits a non-monotonic relationship with performance, with optimal results achieved around 200K steps. Through comprehensive ablation studies and failure case analysis, we provide insights into why simpler architectures excel at visual robustness while deeper models with increased capacity achieve better neural alignment. Our results challenge conventional assumptions about model complexity in visuomotor learning and offer practical guidance for developing robust, biologically-inspired visual agents.
tldr: The paper presents the winning solutions from the NeurIPS 2025 Mouse vs. AI competition, demonstrating the effectiveness of simple CNNs for visual robustness and deeper Gated ResNets for neural alignment in visuomotor learning, challenging assumptions about model complexity.
tldr_zh: 该论文展示了NeurIPS 2025年Mouse vs. AI竞赛的获胜方案，证明了简单CNN在视觉鲁棒性方面的有效性和更深的Gated ResNet在神经对齐方面的有效性，挑战了关于视觉运动学习中模型复杂性的假设。
summary_zh: 视觉鲁棒性和神经对齐仍然是开发能媲美生物视觉系统的人工智能体的关键挑战。我们展示了HCMUS_TheFangs团队在NeurIPS 2025 Mouse vs. AI: 鲁棒视觉觅食竞赛两个赛道中获胜的方法。对于赛道1（视觉鲁棒性），我们证明了架构简洁性与特定组件的结合能够产生卓越的泛化能力，通过轻量级的双层卷积神经网络，并辅以门控线性单元和观测归一化，实现了95.4%的最终得分。对于赛道2（神经对齐），我们开发了一种深度类ResNet架构，包含16个卷积层和基于GLU的门控，以1780万参数实现了顶级的神经预测性能。我们对6万到114万步之间训练的十个模型检查点的系统分析表明，训练时长与性能之间存在非单调关系，最佳结果在20万步左右获得。通过全面的消融研究和失败案例分析，我们深入了解了为什么更简单的架构在视觉鲁棒性方面表现出色，而具有更大容量的更深层模型能够实现更好的神经对齐。我们的结果挑战了关于视觉运动学习中模型复杂性的传统假设，并为开发鲁棒的、受生物启发的视觉智能体提供了实践指导。

title: Learning When to Jump for Off-road Navigation
summary: Low speed does not always guarantee safety in off-road driving. For instance, crossing a ditch may be risky at a low speed due to the risk of getting stuck, yet safe at a higher speed with a controlled, accelerated jump. Achieving such behavior requires path planning that explicitly models complex motion dynamics, whereas existing methods often neglect this aspect and plan solely based on positions or a fixed velocity. To address this gap, we introduce Motion-aware Traversability (MAT) representation to explicitly model terrain cost conditioned on actual robot motion. Instead of assigning a single scalar score for traversability, MAT models each terrain region as a Gaussian function of velocity. During online planning, we decompose the terrain cost computation into two stages: (1) predict terrain-dependent Gaussian parameters from perception in a single forward pass, (2) efficiently update terrain costs for new velocities inferred from current dynamics by evaluating these functions without repeated inference. We develop a system that integrates MAT to enable agile off-road navigation and evaluate it in both simulated and real-world environments with various obstacles. Results show that MAT achieves real-time efficiency and enhances the performance of off-road navigation, reducing path detours by 75% while maintaining safety across challenging terrains.
tldr: The paper introduces Motion-aware Traversability (MAT), a novel terrain representation that models terrain cost as a Gaussian function of velocity, enabling robots to perform agile off-road navigation by learning when to jump to overcome obstacles. This leads to significant path detour reduction compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了运动感知可穿越性（MAT），一种新颖的地形表示方法，将地形成本建模为速度的高斯函数，使机器人能够通过学习何时跳跃来克服障碍，从而实现敏捷的越野导航。与现有方法相比，这显著减少了路径绕行。
summary_zh: 低速行驶并不能始终保证越野驾驶的安全性。例如，以低速越过沟渠可能存在风险，因为存在被困住的可能，然而以更高的速度进行可控的加速跳跃则可能更安全。实现这种行为需要显式地对复杂运动动力学进行建模的路径规划，而现有方法通常忽略这一方面，仅基于位置或固定速度进行规划。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了运动感知可穿越性（MAT）表示，以显式地对依赖于实际机器人运动的地形成本进行建模。MAT并非为可穿越性分配一个单一的标量分数，而是将每个地形区域建模为速度的高斯函数。在在线规划期间，我们将地形成本计算分解为两个阶段：（1）通过一次前向传播，从感知预测地形相关的高斯参数；（2）通过评估这些函数来有效更新当前动力学推断出的新速度对应的地形成本，而无需重复推理。我们开发了一个集成MAT的系统，以实现敏捷的越野导航，并在具有各种障碍物的模拟和真实环境中对其进行评估。结果表明，MAT实现了实时效率，并提高了越野导航的性能，在具有挑战性的地形上将路径绕行减少了75％，同时保持了安全性。

title: Semantically Aware UAV Landing Site Assessment from Remote Sensing Imagery via Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Safe UAV emergency landing requires more than just identifying flat terrain; it demands understanding complex semantic risks (e.g., crowds, temporary structures) invisible to traditional geometric sensors. In this paper, we propose a novel framework leveraging Remote Sensing (RS) imagery and Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for global context-aware landing site assessment. Unlike local geometric methods, our approach employs a coarse-to-fine pipeline: first, a lightweight semantic segmentation module efficiently pre-screens candidate areas; second, a vision-language reasoning agent fuses visual features with Point-of-Interest (POI) data to detect subtle hazards. To validate this approach, we construct and release the Emergency Landing Site Selection (ELSS) benchmark. Experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms geometric baselines in risk identification accuracy. Furthermore, qualitative results confirm its ability to generate human-like, interpretable justifications, enhancing trust in automated decision-making. The benchmark dataset is publicly accessible at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ELSS-dataset-43D7.
tldr: This paper proposes a MLLM-based framework for UAV emergency landing site assessment using remote sensing imagery and POI data, outperforming geometric baselines and providing interpretable justifications. They also release a new dataset, ELSS.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的无人机紧急着陆点评估框架，利用遥感图像和兴趣点（POI）数据，优于几何基线方法，并提供可解释的理由。他们还发布了一个新的数据集ELSS。
summary_zh: 安全无人机紧急降落不仅仅需要识别平坦地形，还需要理解传统几何传感器无法识别的复杂语义风险（例如，人群、临时建筑物）。本文提出了一种利用遥感（RS）影像和多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）进行全局上下文感知着陆点评估的新型框架。与局部几何方法不同，我们的方法采用了一种由粗到精的流程：首先，一个轻量级的语义分割模块高效地预筛选候选区域；其次，一个视觉-语言推理代理将视觉特征与兴趣点（POI）数据融合，以检测细微的危险。为了验证该方法，我们构建并发布了紧急着陆点选择（ELSS）基准。实验表明，我们的框架在风险识别精度方面显著优于几何基线。此外，定性结果证实了其生成类人、可解释的理由的能力，从而增强了对自动化决策的信任。该基准数据集可在以下网址公开访问：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ELSS-dataset-43D7。

title: Lyapunov Stability-Aware Stackelberg Game for Low-Altitude Economy: A Control-Oriented Pruning-Based DRL Approach
summary: With the rapid expansion of the low-altitude economy, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) serve as pivotal aerial base stations supporting diverse services from users, ranging from latency-sensitive critical missions to bandwidth-intensive data streaming. However, the efficacy of such heterogeneous networks is often compromised by the conflict between limited onboard resources and stringent stability requirements. Moving beyond traditional throughput-centric designs, we propose a Sensing-Communication-Computing-Control closed-loop framework that explicitly models the impact of communication latency on physical control stability. To guarantee mission reliability, we leverage the Lyapunov stability theory to derive an intrinsic mapping between the state evolution of the control system and communication constraints, transforming abstract stability requirements into quantifiable resource boundaries. Then, we formulate the resource allocation problem as a Stackelberg game, where UAVs (as leaders) dynamically price resources to balance load and ensure stability, while users (as followers) optimize requests based on service urgency. Furthermore, addressing the prohibitive computational overhead of standard Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) on energy-constrained edge platforms, we propose a novel and lightweight pruning-based Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. By integrating a dynamic structured pruning mechanism, the proposed algorithm significantly compresses the neural network scale during training, enabling the UAV to rapidly approximate the game equilibrium with minimal inference latency. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed scheme effectively secures control loop stability while maximizing system utility in dynamic low-altitude environments.
tldr: This paper presents a Lyapunov stability-aware Stackelberg game framework for UAV resource allocation in low-altitude environments, utilizing a pruning-based DRL approach to ensure control loop stability and maximize system utility.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫稳定性的 Stackelberg 博弈框架，用于低空环境下的无人机资源分配，并利用基于剪枝的 DRL 方法来确保控制回路稳定性和最大化系统效用。
summary_zh: 随着低空经济的快速扩张，无人机（UAVs）作为关键的空中基站，为用户提供多样化的服务，范围涵盖对延迟敏感的关键任务到带宽密集型的数据流传输。然而，这种异构网络的效能经常因有限的机载资源和严格的稳定性需求之间的冲突而受到影响。为了超越传统的以吞吐量为中心的设计，我们提出了一种感知-通信-计算-控制的闭环框架，该框架明确地建模了通信延迟对物理控制稳定性的影响。为了保证任务的可靠性，我们利用 Lyapunov 稳定性理论，推导出控制系统的状态演变与通信约束之间的内在映射，将抽象的稳定性需求转化为可量化的资源边界。然后，我们将资源分配问题建模为一个 Stackelberg 博弈，其中无人机（作为领导者）动态地对资源进行定价以平衡负载并确保稳定性，而用户（作为追随者）则根据服务的紧迫性优化请求。此外，为了解决标准深度强化学习（DRL）在能源受限边缘平台上的高昂计算开销，我们提出了一种新颖且轻量级的基于剪枝的近端策略优化（PPO）算法。通过集成动态结构化剪枝机制，所提出的算法在训练过程中显著压缩了神经网络的规模，使无人机能够以最小的推理延迟快速逼近博弈均衡。仿真结果表明，所提出的方案有效地保证了控制回路的稳定性，同时在动态的低空环境中最大化了系统效用。

title: LASS-ODE: Scaling ODE Computations to Connect Foundation Models with Dynamical Physical Systems
summary: Foundation models have transformed language, vision, and time series data analysis, yet progress on dynamic predictions for physical systems remains limited. Given the complexity of physical constraints, two challenges stand out. $(i)$ Physics-computation scalability: physics-informed learning can enforce physical regularization, but its computation (e.g., ODE integration) does not scale to extensive systems. $(ii)$ Knowledge-sharing efficiency: the attention mechanism is primarily computed within each system, which limits the extraction of shared ODE structures across systems. We show that enforcing ODE consistency does not require expensive nonlinear integration: a token-wise locally linear ODE representation preserves physical fidelity while scaling to foundation-model regimes. Thus, we propose novel token representations that respect locally linear ODE evolution. Such linearity substantially accelerates integration while accurately approximating the local data manifold. Second, we introduce a simple yet effective inter-system attention that augments attention with a common structure hub (CSH) that stores shared tokens and aggregates knowledge across systems. The resulting model, termed LASS-ODE (\underline{LA}rge-\underline{S}cale \underline{S}mall \underline{ODE}), is pretrained on our $40$GB ODE trajectory collections to enable strong in-domain performance, zero-shot generalization across diverse ODE systems, and additional improvements through fine-tuning.
tldr: The paper introduces LASS-ODE, a novel approach to scaling ODE computations for physical systems by using token-wise locally linear ODE representations and inter-system attention with a common structure hub, enabling pretaining on large datasets and improving generalization.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了LASS-ODE，一种通过使用token-wise局部线性ODE表示和具有公共结构中心（CSH）的系统间注意力来扩展物理系统ODE计算的新方法，从而能够在大数据集上进行预训练并提高泛化能力。
summary_zh: 基础模型已经变革了语言、视觉和时间序列数据分析领域，但物理系统动态预测方面的进展仍然有限。鉴于物理约束的复杂性，存在两个突出的挑战。(i) 物理-计算可扩展性：具有物理信息的学习可以强制执行物理正则化，但其计算（例如，ODE积分）无法扩展到大型系统。(ii) 知识共享效率：注意力机制主要在每个系统内部计算，这限制了跨系统共享ODE结构的提取。我们证明，强制执行ODE一致性并不需要昂贵的非线性积分：逐token的局部线性ODE表示保持了物理保真度，同时扩展到了基础模型级别。因此，我们提出了尊重局部线性ODE演化的新型token表示。这种线性大大加速了积分，同时准确地近似了局部数据流形。其次，我们引入了一种简单而有效的系统间注意力，通过一个存储共享token并在系统间聚合知识的公共结构中心（CSH）来增强注意力。由此产生的模型，称为LASS-ODE（\underline{LA}rge-\underline{S}cale \underline{S}mall \underline{ODE}，大规模小ODE），在我们的40GB ODE轨迹集合上进行了预训练，从而实现了强大的领域内性能、跨各种ODE系统的零样本泛化，并通过微调获得了额外的改进。

title: Synapse Compendium Aware Federated Knowledge Exchange for Tool Routed LLMs
summary: Collaborative learning among LLM-based agents under federated learning faces challenges, including communication costs, heterogeneity in data, and tool-usage, limiting their effectiveness. We introduce Synapse, a framework that trains a shared global knowledge model of tool-usage behavior. Client agents with fixed LLMs learn tool-usage patterns locally, and transmit artifacts for federated aggregation through coordinators. A global tool compendium is updated and redistributed, enabling convergence toward stable tool selection. Synapse uses templated representations, embedding retrieval with LLM reranking, and adaptive masking to maintain utility while limiting information leakage. The framework supports heterogeneous data and quantifies performance improvements. Results show that Synapse improves tool-usage effectiveness and reduces communication overhead compared with weight or prompt-sharing approaches in multi-agent LLM systems.
tldr: The paper presents Synapse, a federated learning framework for LLM-based agents that collaboratively learn tool-usage by sharing knowledge artifacts instead of weights or prompts, improving tool-usage effectiveness and reducing communication overhead.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出 Synapse，一个基于联邦学习的 LLM 智能体框架，通过共享知识制品而非权重或提示，协同学习工具使用，从而提高工具使用效率并降低通信开销。
summary_zh: 基于LLM的智能体在联邦学习下的协同学习面临通信成本、数据异构性和工具使用等挑战，从而限制了其有效性。我们提出了Synapse，一个训练工具使用行为共享全局知识模型的框架。具有固定LLM的客户端智能体在本地学习工具使用模式，并通过协调器传输工件进行联邦聚合。一个全局工具纲要被更新和重新分配，从而实现向稳定工具选择的收敛。Synapse使用模板化表示、LLM重排序的嵌入检索和自适应掩码，以在限制信息泄露的同时保持效用。该框架支持异构数据并量化性能提升。结果表明，与多智能体LLM系统中权重或提示共享方法相比，Synapse提高了工具使用有效性并降低了通信开销。

title: Persuasion Propagation in LLM Agents
summary: Modern AI agents increasingly combine conversational interaction with autonomous task execution, such as coding and web research, raising a natural question: what happens when an agent engaged in long-horizon tasks is subjected to user persuasion? We study how belief-level intervention can influence downstream task behavior, a phenomenon we name \emph{persuasion propagation}. We introduce a behavior-centered evaluation framework that distinguishes between persuasion applied during or prior to task execution. Across web research and coding tasks, we find that on-the-fly persuasion induces weak and inconsistent behavioral effects. In contrast, when the belief state is explicitly specified at task time, belief-prefilled agents conduct on average 26.9\% fewer searches and visit 16.9\% fewer unique sources than neutral-prefilled agents. These results suggest that persuasion, even in prior interaction, can affect the agent's behavior, motivating behavior-level evaluation in agentic systems.
tldr: This paper investigates how user persuasion impacts the behavior of LLM agents in long-horizon tasks, finding that persuasion applied *before* task execution has a stronger effect than on-the-fly persuasion.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了用户说服如何影响LLM智能体在长时任务中的行为，发现任务执行*之前*的说服比即时说服具有更强的影响效果。
summary_zh: 现代人工智能代理越来越多地将对话交互与自主任务执行相结合，例如编码和网络研究，这引发了一个自然的问题：当从事长期任务的代理受到用户说服时会发生什么？ 我们研究了信念层面的干预如何影响下游任务行为，我们将这种现象称为\emph{说服传播}。 我们引入了一个以行为为中心的评估框架，该框架区分了应用在任务执行期间或之前的说服。在网络研究和编码任务中，我们发现即时说服会诱发微弱且不一致的行为效应。 相比之下，当在任务执行时明确指定信念状态时，信念预填充的代理平均比中性预填充的代理执行的搜索次数减少26.9%，访问的唯一来源数量减少16.9%。 这些结果表明，即使在先前的交互中，说服也可能影响代理的行为，从而推动了代理系统中行为层面的评估。

title: T2M Mamba: Motion Periodicity-Saliency Coupling Approach for Stable Text-Driven Motion Generation
summary: Text-to-motion generation, which converts motion language descriptions into coherent 3D human motion sequences, has attracted increasing attention in fields, such as avatar animation and humanoid robotic interaction. Though existing models have achieved significant fidelity, they still suffer from two core limitations: (i) They treat motion periodicity and keyframe saliency as independent factors, overlooking their coupling and causing generation drift in long sequences. (ii) They are fragile to semantically equivalent paraphrases, where minor synonym substitutions distort textual embeddings, propagating through the decoder and producing unstable or erroneous motions. In this work, we propose T2M Mamba to address these limitations by (i) proposing Periodicity-Saliency Aware Mamba, which utilizes novel algorithms for keyframe weight estimation via enhanced Density Peaks Clustering and motion periodicity estimation via FFT-accelerated autocorrelation to capture coupled dynamics with minimal computational overhead, and (ii) constructing a Periodic Differential Cross-modal Alignment Module (PDCAM) to enhance robust alignment of textual and motion embeddings. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets have been conducted, confirming the effectiveness of our approach, achieving an FID of 0.068 and consistent gains on all other metrics.
tldr: The paper introduces T2M Mamba, a new model for text-to-motion generation that addresses limitations in existing models by coupling motion periodicity and keyframe saliency and improving robustness to semantically equivalent paraphrases, demonstrated through experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 T2M Mamba，一种新的文本到动作生成模型，通过耦合运动周期性和关键帧显著性并提高对语义等价释义的鲁棒性，解决了现有模型的局限性，并在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 数据集上的实验中得到了验证。
summary_zh:
以下为翻译结果：

文本到运动生成，即将运动语言描述转换为连贯的3D人体运动序列，受到了化身动画和类人机器人交互等领域越来越多的关注。虽然现有模型已经取得了显著的逼真度，但它们仍然存在两个核心局限性：（i）它们将运动周期性和关键帧显著性视为独立因素，忽略了它们之间的耦合性，导致长序列中的生成漂移。（ii）它们对语义等价的释义非常脆弱，细微的同义词替换会扭曲文本嵌入，通过解码器传播并产生不稳定或错误的运动。在这项工作中，我们提出了T2M Mamba来解决这些局限性，方法是（i）提出周期性-显著性感知Mamba，它利用新颖的算法，通过增强的密度峰值聚类进行关键帧权重估计，并通过FFT加速的自相关进行运动周期性估计，从而以最小的计算开销捕获耦合动力学，以及（ii）构建一个周期性差分跨模态对齐模块（PDCAM）以增强文本和运动嵌入的鲁棒对齐。在HumanML3D和KIT-ML数据集上进行了广泛的实验，证实了我们方法的有效性，实现了0.068的FID，并在所有其他指标上取得了持续的收益。

title: Med3D-R1: Incentivizing Clinical Reasoning in 3D Medical Vision-Language Models for Abnormality Diagnosis
summary: Developing 3D vision-language models with robust clinical reasoning remains a challenge due to the inherent complexity of volumetric medical imaging, the tendency of models to overfit superficial report patterns, and the lack of interpretability-aware reward designs. In this paper, we propose Med3D-R1, a reinforcement learning framework with a two-stage training process: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). During SFT stage, we introduce a residual alignment mechanism to bridge the gap between high-dimensional 3D features and textual embeddings, and an abnormality re-weighting strategy to emphasize clinically informative tokens and reduce structural bias in reports. In RL stage, we redesign the consistency reward to explicitly promote coherent, step-by-step diagnostic reasoning. We evaluate our method on medical multiple-choice visual question answering using two 3D diagnostic benchmarks, CT-RATE and RAD-ChestCT, where our model attains state-of-the-art accuracies of 41.92\% on CT-RATE and 44.99\% on RAD-ChestCT. These results indicate improved abnormality diagnosis and clinical reasoning and outperform prior methods on both benchmarks. Overall, our approach holds promise for enhancing real-world diagnostic workflows by enabling more reliable and transparent 3D medical vision-language systems.
tldr: Med3D-R1 is a reinforcement learning framework for 3D medical vision-language models that improves clinical reasoning and abnormality diagnosis, achieving state-of-the-art results on two 3D diagnostic benchmarks by using a residual alignment mechanism, abnormality re-weighting strategy, and consistency reward.
tldr_zh: Med3D-R1是一个用于3D医学视觉-语言模型的强化学习框架，它通过使用残差对齐机制、异常重新加权策略和一致性奖励，提高了临床推理和异常诊断能力，并在两个3D诊断基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh:
摘要：
由于容积医学影像固有的复杂性、模型过度拟合表面报告模式的倾向以及缺乏可解释性导向的奖励设计，开发具有鲁棒临床推理能力的三维视觉-语言模型仍然是一项挑战。本文提出Med3D-R1，一个具有两阶段训练过程的强化学习框架：监督精调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）。在SFT阶段，我们引入残差对齐机制来弥合高维三维特征与文本嵌入之间的差距，并引入异常重加权策略来强调临床信息丰富的标记并减少报告中的结构性偏差。在RL阶段，我们重新设计了一致性奖励，以明确地促进连贯的、逐步的诊断推理。我们使用两个三维诊断基准测试CT-RATE和RAD-ChestCT，在医学多项选择视觉问答任务上评估了我们的方法，在CT-RATE上我们的模型达到了41.92\%的最先进准确率，在RAD-ChestCT上达到了44.99\%的最先进准确率。这些结果表明异常诊断和临床推理能力得到了提高，并且在两个基准测试上都优于先前的方法。总而言之，我们的方法通过实现更可靠和透明的三维医学视觉-语言系统，有望增强现实世界的诊断工作流程。

title: Distill3R: A Pipeline for Democratizing 3D Foundation Models on Commodity Hardware
summary: While multi-view 3D reconstruction has shifted toward large-scale foundation models capable of inferring globally consistent geometry, their reliance on massive computational clusters for training has created a significant barrier to entry for most academic laboratories. To bridge this compute divide, we introduce Distill3R, a framework designed to distill the geometric reasoning of 3D foundation models into compact students fully trainable on a single workstation. Our methodology centers on two primary innovations: (1) an offline caching pipeline that decouples heavy teacher inference from the training loop through compressed supervision signals, and (2) a confidence-aware distillation loss that leverages teacher uncertainty to enable training on commodity hardware. We propose a 72M-parameter student model which achieves a 9x reduction in parameters and a 5x inference speedup compared to its 650M-parameter teacher. The student is fully trainable in under 3 days on a single workstation, whereas its teacher requires massive GPU clusters for up to a week. We demonstrate that the student preserves the structural consistency and qualitative geometric understanding required for functional 3D awareness. By providing a reproducible, single-workstation training recipe, Distill3R serves as an exploratory entry point for democratized 3D vision research and efficient edge deployment. This work is not intended to compete with state-of-the-art foundation models, but to provide an accessible research baseline for laboratories without access to large-scale compute to train and specialize models on their own domain-specific data at minimal cost.
tldr: The paper introduces Distill3R, a framework for distilling 3D foundation models to smaller models trainable on commodity hardware, enabling more accessible 3D vision research and edge deployment.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Distill3R，一个可以将 3D 基础模型提炼成在普通硬件上训练的小模型的框架，从而使 3D 视觉研究和边缘部署更易于访问。
summary_zh: 虽然多视角三维重建已转向能够推断全局一致几何结构的大规模基础模型，但它们对训练所需的大规模计算集群的依赖，为大多数学术实验室设置了显著的准入壁垒。为了弥合这一计算差距，我们引入了Distill3R，一个旨在将三维基础模型的几何推理能力提炼到紧凑型学生模型中的框架，该学生模型完全可以在单台工作站上进行训练。我们的方法论主要围绕两项创新：（1）一种离线缓存管道，通过压缩的监督信号将繁重的教师模型推理与训练循环解耦；（2）一种置信度感知蒸馏损失，它利用教师模型的不确定性，从而能够在普通硬件上进行训练。我们提出了一个具有7200万参数的学生模型，与具有6.5亿参数的教师模型相比，参数量减少了9倍，推理速度提高了5倍。该学生模型可以在不到3天的时间内在单台工作站上完全训练，而其教师模型则需要大规模GPU集群长达一周的时间。我们证明，该学生模型保留了功能性三维感知所需的结构一致性和定性几何理解能力。通过提供可复现的、单工作站训练方案，Distill3R为民主化的三维视觉研究和高效的边缘部署提供了一个探索性的入口点。这项工作并非旨在与最先进的基础模型竞争，而是为那些无法访问大规模计算资源的实验室提供一个可访问的研究基线，以便以最低的成本在他们自己的特定领域数据上训练和专门化模型。

title: TransNormal: Dense Visual Semantics for Diffusion-based Transparent Object Normal Estimation
summary: Monocular normal estimation for transparent objects is critical for laboratory automation, yet it remains challenging due to complex light refraction and reflection. These optical properties often lead to catastrophic failures in conventional depth and normal sensors, hindering the deployment of embodied AI in scientific environments. We propose TransNormal, a novel framework that adapts pre-trained diffusion priors for single-step normal regression. To handle the lack of texture in transparent surfaces, TransNormal integrates dense visual semantics from DINOv3 via a cross-attention mechanism, providing strong geometric cues. Furthermore, we employ a multi-task learning objective and wavelet-based regularization to ensure the preservation of fine-grained structural details. To support this task, we introduce TransNormal-Synthetic, a physics-based dataset with high-fidelity normal maps for transparent labware. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TransNormal significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods: on the ClearGrasp benchmark, it reduces mean error by 24.4% and improves 11.25° accuracy by 22.8%; on ClearPose, it achieves a 15.2% reduction in mean error. The code and dataset will be made publicly available at https://longxiang-ai.github.io/TransNormal.
tldr: TransNormal is a novel framework leveraging diffusion priors and dense visual semantics for monocular normal estimation of transparent objects, validated on a new synthetic dataset and demonstrating state-of-the-art performance on existing benchmarks.
tldr_zh: TransNormal是一个新颖的框架，它利用扩散先验和密集视觉语义进行透明物体的单目法线估计。该方法通过在一个新的合成数据集上验证，并在现有基准测试上表现出最好的性能。
summary_zh: 透明物体的单目法向量估计对于实验室自动化至关重要，但由于复杂的光线折射和反射，它仍然具有挑战性。这些光学特性通常会导致传统深度和法向量传感器的灾难性故障，从而阻碍具身人工智能在科学环境中的部署。我们提出了TransNormal，一种新颖的框架，它采用预训练的扩散先验进行单步法向量回归。为了处理透明表面上缺乏纹理的问题，TransNormal通过交叉注意力机制集成了来自DINOv3的密集视觉语义，从而提供了强大的几何线索。此外，我们采用多任务学习目标和基于小波的正则化，以确保保留细粒度的结构细节。为了支持这项任务，我们引入了TransNormal-Synthetic，一个基于物理学的透明实验室玻璃器皿数据集，其中包含高保真度的法向量图。大量实验表明，TransNormal显著优于当前最先进的方法：在ClearGrasp基准测试中，它将平均误差降低了24.4%，并将11.25°的精度提高了22.8%；在ClearPose上，它实现了15.2%的平均误差降低。代码和数据集将在https://longxiang-ai.github.io/TransNormal上公开提供。

title: Best-of-Both-Worlds for Heavy-Tailed Markov Decision Processes
summary: We investigate episodic Markov Decision Processes with heavy-tailed feedback (HTMDPs). Existing approaches for HTMDPs are conservative in stochastic environments and lack adaptivity in adversarial regimes. In this work, we propose algorithms HT-FTRL-OM and HT-FTRL-UOB for HTMDPs that achieve Best-of-Both-Worlds (BoBW) guarantees: instance-independent regret in adversarial environments and logarithmic instance-dependent regret in self-bounding (including the stochastic case) environments. For the known transition setting, HT-FTRL-OM applies the Follow-The-Regularized-Leader (FTRL) framework over occupancy measures with novel skipping loss estimators, achieving a $\widetilde{O}(T^{1/α})$ regret bound in adversarial regimes and a $O(\log T)$ regret in stochastic regimes. Building upon this framework, we develop a novel algorithm HT-FTRL-UOB to tackle the more challenging unknown-transition setting. This algorithm employs a pessimistic skipping loss estimator and achieves a $\widetilde{O}(T^{1/α} + \sqrt{T})$ regret in adversarial regimes and a $O(\log^2(T))$ regret in stochastic regimes. Our analysis overcomes key barriers through several technical insights, including a local control mechanism for heavy-tailed shifted losses, a new suboptimal-mass propagation principle, and a novel regret decomposition that isolates transition uncertainty from heavy-tailed estimation errors and skipping bias.
tldr: This paper proposes two novel algorithms, HT-FTRL-OM and HT-FTRL-UOB, for Markov Decision Processes with heavy-tailed feedback, achieving best-of-both-worlds regret guarantees in both adversarial and stochastic environments.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文提出了两种新的算法，HT-FTRL-OM和HT-FTRL-UOB，用于具有重尾反馈的马尔可夫决策过程，在对抗性和随机环境中都实现了最佳的遗憾保证。
summary_zh: 我们研究了具有重尾反馈的回合马尔可夫决策过程 (HTMDPs)。现有的 HTMDPs 方法在随机环境中过于保守，在对抗性场景中缺乏自适应性。在这项工作中，我们提出了用于 HTMDPs 的算法 HT-FTRL-OM 和 HT-FTRL-UOB，它们实现了兼顾最佳（BoBW）保证：在对抗性环境中实现实例无关的遗憾值，在自限定（包括随机情况）环境中实现对数级的实例相关遗憾值。对于已知转移概率的情形，HT-FTRL-OM 将正则化领导者追踪 (FTRL) 框架应用于占用测度，并采用新颖的跳跃损失估计器，在对抗性场景中实现了$\widetilde{O}(T^{1/α})$的遗憾值上界，在随机场景中实现了$O(\log T)$的遗憾值。在此框架的基础上，我们开发了一种新的算法 HT-FTRL-UOB 来处理更具挑战性的未知转移概率情形。该算法采用悲观跳跃损失估计器，并在对抗性场景中实现了$\widetilde{O}(T^{1/α} + \sqrt{T})$的遗憾值，在随机场景中实现了$O(\log^2(T))$的遗憾值。我们的分析通过几个技术性见解克服了关键障碍，包括重尾位移损失的局部控制机制、一种新的次优质量传播原理，以及一种将转移不确定性与重尾估计误差和跳跃偏差隔离的新型遗憾分解。

title: From Intents to Actions: Agentic AI in Autonomous Networks
summary: Telecommunication networks are increasingly expected to operate autonomously while supporting heterogeneous services with diverse and often conflicting intents -- that is, performance objectives, constraints, and requirements specific to each service. However, transforming high-level intents -- such as ultra-low latency, high throughput, or energy efficiency -- into concrete control actions (i.e., low-level actuator commands) remains beyond the capability of existing heuristic approaches. This work introduces an Agentic AI system for intent-driven autonomous networks, structured around three specialized agents. A supervisory interpreter agent, powered by language models, performs both lexical parsing of intents into executable optimization templates and cognitive refinement based on feedback, constraint feasibility, and evolving network conditions. An optimizer agent converts these templates into tractable optimization problems, analyzes trade-offs, and derives preferences across objectives. Lastly, a preference-driven controller agent, based on multi-objective reinforcement learning, leverages these preferences to operate near the Pareto frontier of network performance that best satisfies the original intent. Collectively, these agents enable networks to autonomously interpret, reason over, adapt to, and act upon diverse intents and network conditions in a scalable manner.
tldr: This paper proposes an Agentic AI system for autonomous networks, utilizing language models and multi-objective reinforcement learning to translate high-level intents into concrete network control actions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自治网络的Agentic AI系统，该系统利用语言模型和多目标强化学习将高级意图转化为具体的网络控制动作。
summary_zh: 电信网络越来越需要在自主运行的同时，支持具有不同且通常相互冲突意图的异构服务——即，特定于每个服务的性能目标、约束和需求。然而，将超低延迟、高吞吐量或能源效率等高级意图转化为具体的控制行动（即，低级执行器命令）仍然超出现有启发式方法的能力范围。本研究引入了一种用于意图驱动自主网络的Agent AI系统，该系统围绕三个专门的Agent构建。一个由语言模型驱动的监管解释器Agent，执行意图的词法解析，将其转化为可执行的优化模板，并基于反馈、约束可行性和不断演变的网络状况进行认知细化。一个优化器Agent将这些模板转化为可处理的优化问题，分析权衡，并推导出不同目标之间的偏好。最后，一个基于多目标强化学习的偏好驱动控制器Agent，利用这些偏好在网络性能的帕累托前沿附近运行，从而最好地满足原始意图。总而言之，这些Agent使网络能够以可扩展的方式自主地解释、推理、适应和行动，从而响应各种意图和网络状况。

title: Unraveling the Hidden Dynamical Structure in Recurrent Neural Policies
summary: Recurrent neural policies are widely used in partially observable control and meta-RL tasks. Their abilities to maintain internal memory and adapt quickly to unseen scenarios have offered them unparalleled performance when compared to non-recurrent counterparts. However, until today, the underlying mechanisms for their superior generalization and robustness performance remain poorly understood. In this study, by analyzing the hidden state domain of recurrent policies learned over a diverse set of training methods, model architectures, and tasks, we find that stable cyclic structures consistently emerge during interaction with the environment. Such cyclic structures share a remarkable similarity with \textit{limit cycles} in dynamical system analysis, if we consider the policy and the environment as a joint hybrid dynamical system. Moreover, we uncover that the geometry of such limit cycles also has a structured correspondence with the policies' behaviors. These findings offer new perspectives to explain many nice properties of recurrent policies: the emergence of limit cycles stabilizes both the policies' internal memory and the task-relevant environmental states, while suppressing nuisance variability arising from environmental uncertainty; the geometry of limit cycles also encodes relational structures of behaviors, facilitating easier skill adaptation when facing non-stationary environments.
tldr: This paper analyzes recurrent neural policies and finds that stable cyclic structures, resembling limit cycles in dynamical systems, emerge in the hidden state domain, which explains their generalization and robustness performance in partially observable settings.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了循环神经网络策略，发现隐藏状态域中出现了稳定的循环结构，类似于动力系统中的极限环，这解释了它们在部分可观察环境中的泛化和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 循环神经网络策略被广泛应用于部分可观控制和元强化学习任务中。与非循环神经网络相比，它们维持内部记忆和快速适应未知场景的能力使它们具有无与伦比的性能。然而，至今为止，它们卓越的泛化和鲁棒性的潜在机制仍知之甚少。在本研究中，通过分析在各种训练方法、模型架构和任务上学习的循环策略的隐藏状态域，我们发现稳定的循环结构在与环境交互过程中持续涌现。如果我们把策略和环境看作一个联合的混合动力系统，这种循环结构与动力系统分析中的\textit{极限环}表现出惊人的相似性。此外，我们发现这种极限环的几何结构也与策略的行为具有结构化的对应关系。这些发现为解释循环策略的许多优良特性提供了新的视角：极限环的出现稳定了策略的内部记忆和与任务相关的环境状态，同时抑制了环境不确定性带来的有害变异；极限环的几何结构也编码了行为的关系结构，从而在面对非平稳环境时更容易进行技能适应。

title: On the Convergence of Jacobian-Free Backpropagation for Optimal Control Problems with Implicit Hamiltonians
summary: Optimal feedback control with implicit Hamiltonians poses a fundamental challenge for learning-based value function methods due to the absence of closed-form optimal control laws. Recent work~\cite{gelphman2025end} introduced an implicit deep learning approach using Jacobian-Free Backpropagation (JFB) to address this setting, but only established sample-wise descent guarantees. In this paper, we establish convergence guarantees for JFB in the stochastic minibatch setting, showing that the resulting updates converge to stationary points of the expected optimal control objective. We further demonstrate scalability on substantially higher-dimensional problems, including multi-agent optimal consumption and swarm-based quadrotor and bicycle control. Together, our results provide both theoretical justification and empirical evidence for using JFB in high-dimensional optimal control with implicit Hamiltonians.
tldr: This paper establishes convergence guarantees for Jacobian-Free Backpropagation (JFB) in stochastic minibatch settings for optimal control problems with implicit Hamiltonians, demonstrating scalability on high-dimensional problems.
tldr_zh: 本文为具有隐式哈密顿量的最优控制问题，在随机小批量设置中，建立了无雅可比回传（JFB）的收敛性保证，并在高维问题上展示了可扩展性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
具有隐式哈密顿量的最优反馈控制对基于学习的价值函数方法提出了根本性挑战，原因是缺乏闭式最优控制律。最近的工作~\cite{gelphman2025end}引入了一种使用无雅可比矩阵反向传播 (JFB) 的隐式深度学习方法来解决此问题，但仅建立了样本级别的下降保证。在本文中，我们建立了随机小批量设置下 JFB 的收敛性保证，表明所产生的更新收敛到期望最优控制目标的驻点。我们进一步展示了在高维度问题中的可扩展性，包括多智能体最优消费以及基于集群的四旋翼和自行车控制。总之，我们的结果为在高维度最优控制中使用隐式哈密顿量的 JFB 提供了理论依据和经验证据。

title: To Defend Against Cyber Attacks, We Must Teach AI Agents to Hack
summary: For over a decade, cybersecurity has relied on human labor scarcity to limit attackers to high-value targets manually or generic automated attacks at scale. Building sophisticated exploits requires deep expertise and manual effort, leading defenders to assume adversaries cannot afford tailored attacks at scale. AI agents break this balance by automating vulnerability discovery and exploitation across thousands of targets, needing only small success rates to remain profitable. Current developers focus on preventing misuse through data filtering, safety alignment, and output guardrails. Such protections fail against adversaries who control open-weight models, bypass safety controls, or develop offensive capabilities independently. We argue that AI-agent-driven cyber attacks are inevitable, requiring a fundamental shift in defensive strategy. In this position paper, we identify why existing defenses cannot stop adaptive adversaries and demonstrate that defenders must develop offensive security intelligence. We propose three actions for building frontier offensive AI capabilities responsibly. First, construct comprehensive benchmarks covering the full attack lifecycle. Second, advance from workflow-based to trained agents for discovering in-wild vulnerabilities at scale. Third, implement governance restricting offensive agents to audited cyber ranges, staging release by capability tier, and distilling findings into safe defensive-only agents. We strongly recommend treating offensive AI capabilities as essential defensive infrastructure, as containing cybersecurity risks requires mastering them in controlled settings before adversaries do.
tldr: This paper argues that AI-driven cyber attacks are inevitable and proposes that defenders develop offensive AI capabilities, including comprehensive benchmarks and trained agents, within controlled environments as a crucial defensive strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文认为，人工智能驱动的网络攻击不可避免，并提出防御者应在受控环境中开发包括综合基准和训练有素的智能体在内的攻击性人工智能能力，作为一种关键的防御策略。
summary_zh: 网络安全十多年来一直依赖于人类劳动力的稀缺性，以限制攻击者只能手动攻击高价值目标或进行大规模的通用自动化攻击。构建复杂的漏洞利用需要深入的专业知识和人工投入，因此防御者认为攻击者无法承担大规模的定制攻击。人工智能代理打破了这种平衡，通过自动化对数千个目标的漏洞发现和利用，只需要很小的成功率就能保持盈利。目前的开发者专注于通过数据过滤、安全对齐和输出防护栏来防止滥用。然而，这些保护措施对控制开放权重模型、绕过安全控制或独立开发攻击能力的对手无效。我们认为，由人工智能代理驱动的网络攻击是不可避免的，需要对防御策略进行根本性的转变。在这篇立场文件中，我们阐明了为什么现有的防御措施无法阻止适应性强的对手，并论证了防御者必须发展进攻性安全情报。我们提出了三个负责任地构建前沿进攻性人工智能能力的行动方案。首先，构建涵盖完整攻击生命周期的全面基准。其次，从基于工作流的代理发展到经过训练的代理，以便大规模地发现野外漏洞。第三，实施治理措施，将进攻性代理限制在经过审计的网络靶场内，按能力等级分阶段发布，并将发现结果提炼成安全的、仅用于防御的代理。我们强烈建议将进攻性人工智能能力视为必不可少的防御基础设施，因为控制网络安全风险需要在对手掌握之前，在受控环境中掌握它们。

title: VividVoice: A Unified Framework for Scene-Aware Visually-Driven Speech Synthesis
summary: We introduce and define a novel task-Scene-Aware Visually-Driven Speech Synthesis, aimed at addressing the limitations of existing speech generation models in creating immersive auditory experiences that align with the real physical world. To tackle the two core challenges of data scarcity and modality decoupling, we propose VividVoice, a unified generative framework. First, we constructed a large-scale, high-quality hybrid multimodal dataset, Vivid-210K, which, through an innovative programmatic pipeline, establishes a strong correlation between visual scenes, speaker identity, and audio for the first time. Second, we designed a core alignment module, D-MSVA, which leverages a decoupled memory bank architecture and a cross-modal hybrid supervision strategy to achieve fine-grained alignment from visual scenes to timbre and environmental acoustic features. Both subjective and objective experimental results provide strong evidence that VividVoice significantly outperforms existing baseline models in terms of audio fidelity, content clarity, and multimodal consistency. Our demo is available at https://chengyuann.github.io/VividVoice/.
tldr: The paper introduces VividVoice, a new framework for scene-aware visually-driven speech synthesis, addressing data scarcity and modality decoupling by using a large-scale multimodal dataset and a decoupled memory bank architecture for fine-grained alignment.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 VividVoice，一个用于场景感知的视觉驱动语音合成的新框架，通过使用大规模多模态数据集和一个解耦的记忆库架构进行细粒度对齐，解决了数据稀缺和模态解耦问题。
summary_zh: 我们提出并定义了一个新的任务——场景感知视觉驱动的语音合成，旨在解决现有语音生成模型在创造与真实物理世界一致的沉浸式听觉体验方面的局限性。为了应对数据稀缺和模态解耦这两大核心挑战，我们提出了VividVoice，一个统一的生成框架。首先，我们构建了一个大规模、高质量的混合多模态数据集Vivid-210K，该数据集通过创新的程序化流程，首次在视觉场景、说话人身份和音频之间建立了强关联。其次，我们设计了一个核心对齐模块，D-MSVA，它利用解耦的记忆库架构和跨模态混合监督策略，实现从视觉场景到音色和环境声学特征的细粒度对齐。主观和客观实验结果均有力地证明，VividVoice在音频保真度、内容清晰度和多模态一致性方面显著优于现有的基线模型。我们的演示网址为https://chengyuann.github.io/VividVoice/。

title: GMAC: Global Multi-View Constraint for Automatic Multi-Camera Extrinsic Calibration
summary: Automatic calibration of multi-camera systems, namely the accurate estimation of spatial extrinsic parameters, is fundamental for 3D reconstruction, panoramic perception, and multi-view data fusion. Existing methods typically rely on calibration targets, explicit geometric modeling, or task-specific neural networks. Such approaches often exhibit limited robustness and applicability in complex dynamic environments or online scenarios, making them difficult to deploy in practical applications. To address this, this paper proposes GMAC, a multi-camera extrinsic estimation framework based on the implicit geometric representations learned by multi-view reconstruction networks. GMAC models extrinsics as global variables constrained by the latent multi-view geometric structure and prunes and structurally reconfigures existing networks so that their latent features can directly support extrinsic prediction through a lightweight regression head, without requiring a completely new network design. Furthermore, GMAC jointly optimizes cross-view reprojection consistency and multi-view cycle consistency, ensuring geometric coherence across cameras while improving prediction accuracy and optimization stability. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world multi-camera datasets demonstrate that GMAC achieves accurate and stable extrinsic estimation without explicit 3D reconstruction or manual calibration, providing a new solution for efficient deployment and online calibration of multi-camera systems.
tldr: The paper introduces GMAC, a novel framework for automatic multi-camera extrinsic calibration using implicit geometric representations learned by multi-view reconstruction networks, enhancing robustness and applicability in dynamic environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GMAC，一种新颖的用于自动多摄像头外参标定的框架，它利用多视图重建网络学习到的隐式几何表示，从而增强了在动态环境中的鲁棒性和适用性。
summary_zh: 多相机系统的自动标定，即对空间外参的精确估计，是三维重建、全景感知和多视图数据融合的基础。现有方法通常依赖于标定靶标、显式的几何建模或特定任务的神经网络。这些方法在复杂的动态环境或在线场景中通常表现出有限的鲁棒性和适用性，使其难以在实际应用中部署。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于多视图重建网络学习的隐式几何表示的多相机外参估计框架GMAC。 GMAC将外参建模为受潜在多视图几何结构约束的全局变量，并对现有网络进行剪枝和结构重构，使其潜在特征可以通过轻量级的回归头直接支持外参预测，而无需全新的网络设计。此外，GMAC联合优化跨视图的重投影一致性和多视图的循环一致性，确保跨相机的几何连贯性，同时提高预测精度和优化稳定性。在合成和真实世界的多相机数据集上的实验表明，GMAC无需显式的三维重建或手动标定即可实现准确稳定的外参估计，为多相机系统的有效部署和在线标定提供了一种新的解决方案。

title: Invariance on Manifolds: Understanding Robust Visual Representations for Place Recognition
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) demands representations robust to drastic environmental and viewpoint shifts. Current aggregation paradigms, however, either rely on data-hungry supervision or simplistic first-order statistics, often neglecting intrinsic structural correlations. In this work, we propose a Second-Order Geometric Statistics framework that inherently captures geometric stability without training. We conceptualize scenes as covariance descriptors on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold, where perturbations manifest as tractable congruence transformations. By leveraging geometry-aware Riemannian mappings, we project these descriptors into a linearized Euclidean embedding, effectively decoupling signal structure from noise. Our approach introduces a training-free framework built upon fixed, pre-trained backbones, achieving strong zero-shot generalization without parameter updates. Extensive experiments confirm that our method achieves highly competitive performance against state-of-the-art baselines, particularly excelling in challenging zero-shot scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces a training-free, second-order geometric statistics framework for Visual Place Recognition (VPR) that leverages Riemannian geometry to achieve robust zero-shot generalization against viewpoint and environmental changes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种无需训练的二阶几何统计框架，用于视觉场景识别 (VPR)。该框架利用黎曼几何来实现强大的零样本泛化能力，抵抗视角和环境变化。
summary_zh: 视觉场景识别（VPR）需要对剧烈的环境和视角变化具有鲁棒性的表征。然而，目前的聚合范式要么依赖于数据密集型监督，要么依赖于简单的第一阶统计量，常常忽略了内在的结构相关性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种二阶几何统计框架，该框架本质上捕获了几何稳定性而无需训练。我们将场景概念化为对称正定（SPD）流形上的协方差描述符，其中扰动表现为易于处理的同余变换。通过利用几何感知的黎曼映射，我们将这些描述符投影到线性化的欧几里得嵌入中，有效地将信号结构与噪声解耦。我们的方法引入了一种基于固定的、预训练主干网络的免训练框架，在不更新参数的情况下实现了强大的零样本泛化能力。大量实验证实，我们的方法在与最先进的基线方法相比，获得了极具竞争力的性能，尤其是在具有挑战性的零样本场景中表现出色。

title: Estimating Force Interactions of Deformable Linear Objects from their Shapes
summary: This work introduces an analytical approach for detecting and estimating external forces acting on deformable linear objects (DLOs) using only their observed shapes. In many robot-wire interaction tasks, contact occurs not at the end-effector but at other points along the robot's body. Such scenarios arise when robots manipulate wires indirectly (e.g., by nudging) or when wires act as passive obstacles in the environment. Accurately identifying these interactions is crucial for safe and efficient trajectory planning, helping to prevent wire damage, avoid restricted robot motions, and mitigate potential hazards. Existing approaches often rely on expensive external force-torque sensor or that contacts occur at the end-effector for accurate force estimation. Using wire shape information acquired from a depth camera and under the assumption that the wire is in or near its static equilibrium, our method estimates both the location and magnitude of external forces without additional prior knowledge. This is achieved by exploiting derived consistency conditions and solving a system of linear equations based on force-torque balance along the wire. The approach was validated through simulation, where it achieved high accuracy, and through real-world experiments, where accurate estimation was demonstrated in selected interaction scenarios.
tldr: The paper presents an analytical method for estimating external forces acting on deformable linear objects based on their observed shapes, validated through simulations and real-world experiments, addressing the challenge of force estimation in robot-wire interaction tasks when contact occurs away from the end-effector.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于可变形线性物体形状来估计其受到的外力的分析方法，通过仿真和实际实验验证了其有效性，旨在解决机器人-导线交互任务中，当接触点不在末端执行器时，力估计的难题。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种分析方法，仅利用可变形线性物体(DLO)的观测形状来检测和估计作用在其上的外部力。在许多机器人-线缆交互任务中，接触并非发生在末端执行器上，而是发生在机器人本体沿线的其他点。当机器人间接操作线缆（例如，通过轻推）或线缆充当环境中的被动障碍物时，就会出现这种情况。准确识别这些交互对于安全高效的轨迹规划至关重要，有助于防止线缆损坏、避免受限的机器人运动并减轻潜在的危险。现有的方法通常依赖于昂贵的外部力/力矩传感器，或者假设接触发生在末端执行器上，以实现精确的力估计。我们的方法利用从深度相机获取的线缆形状信息，并在假设线缆处于或接近其静态平衡状态的前提下，无需额外的先验知识，即可估计外部力的位置和大小。这通过利用推导出的相容性条件并求解基于线缆沿线力-力矩平衡的线性方程组来实现。该方法已通过仿真验证，实现了高精度，并通过真实世界实验验证，在选定的交互场景中证明了其准确的估计能力。

title: Minimal Footprint Grasping Inspired by Ants
summary: Ants are highly capable of grasping objects in clutter, and we have recently observed that this involves substantial use of their forelegs. The forelegs, more specifically the tarsi, have high friction microstructures (setal pads), are covered in hairs, and have a flexible under-actuated tip. Here we abstract these features to test their functional advantages for a novel low-cost gripper design, suitable for bin-picking applications. In our implementation, the gripper legs are long and slim, with high friction gripping pads, low friction hairs and single-segment tarsus-like structure to mimic the insect's setal pads, hairs, and the tarsi's interactive compliance. Experimental evaluation shows this design is highly robust for grasping a wide variety of individual consumer objects, with all grasp attempts successful. In addition, we demonstrate this design is effective for picking single objects from dense clutter, a task at which ants also show high competence. The work advances grasping technology and shed new light on the mechanical importance of hairy structures and tarsal flexibility in insects.
tldr: This paper presents a novel, low-cost gripper design inspired by ant forelegs, demonstrating robust grasping capabilities for individual objects and effective single-object picking from clutter.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种受蚂蚁前腿启发的新型低成本夹爪设计，展示了对单个物体的强大抓取能力和从杂乱环境中有效拾取单个物体的能力。
summary_zh: 蚂蚁在杂乱环境中抓取物体能力极强，我们最近观察到这涉及对其前腿的大量使用。更具体地说，前腿（尤其是跗节）拥有高摩擦的微结构（刚毛垫），覆盖着毛发，并具有灵活的欠驱动尖端。本文中，我们抽象出这些特征，以测试其在一种新型低成本夹爪设计中的功能优势，该夹爪适用于料箱拣选应用。在我们的实现中，夹爪腿部细长，具有高摩擦抓握垫，低摩擦的毛发和单节跗节状结构，以模仿昆虫的刚毛垫、毛发和跗节的交互顺应性。实验评估表明，这种设计在抓取各种消费品时非常稳健，所有抓取尝试都成功了。此外，我们还证明了这种设计能够有效地从密集杂乱中拣选单个物体，这是一项蚂蚁也表现出高能力的任务。这项工作推进了抓取技术，并阐明了昆虫毛状结构和跗节柔韧性的机械重要性。

title: Multi-Agent Causal Reasoning System for Error Pattern Rule Automation in Vehicles
summary: Modern vehicles generate thousands of different discrete events known as Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs). Automotive manufacturers use Boolean combinations of these codes, called error patterns (EPs), to characterize system faults and ensure vehicle safety. Yet, EP rules are still manually handcrafted by domain experts, a process that is expensive and prone to errors as vehicle complexity grows. This paper introduces CAREP (Causal Automated Reasoning for Error Patterns), a multi-agent system that automatizes the generation of EP rules from high-dimensional event sequences of DTCs. CAREP combines a causal discovery agent that identifies potential DTC-EP relations, a contextual information agent that integrates metadata and descriptions, and an orchestrator agent that synthesizes candidate boolean rules together with interpretable reasoning traces. Evaluation on a large-scale automotive dataset with over 29,100 unique DTCs and 474 error patterns demonstrates that CAREP can automatically and accurately discover the unknown EP rules, outperforming LLM-only baselines while providing transparent causal explanations. By uniting practical causal discovery and agent-based reasoning, CAREP represents a step toward fully automated fault diagnostics, enabling scalable, interpretable, and cost-efficient vehicle maintenance.
tldr: The paper introduces CAREP, a multi-agent system that automates the generation of error pattern rules for vehicle fault diagnostics using causal discovery and interpretable reasoning, outperforming LLM-only baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种多智能体系统 CAREP，该系统使用因果发现和可解释推理自动生成车辆故障诊断的错误模式规则，性能优于仅使用大型语言模型的基线方法。
summary_zh: 现代汽车产生数千种不同的离散事件，称为诊断故障码（DTCs）。汽车制造商使用这些代码的布尔组合，称为错误模式（EPs），来表征系统故障并确保车辆安全。然而，EP规则仍然由领域专家手工制定，随着车辆复杂性的增加，这个过程既昂贵又容易出错。本文介绍CAREP（用于错误模式的因果自动推理），一个多智能体系统，可以自动从 DTCs 的高维事件序列中生成 EP 规则。CAREP 结合了一个因果发现智能体（识别潜在的 DTC-EP 关系）、一个上下文信息智能体（整合元数据和描述）以及一个协调智能体（合成候选布尔规则以及可解释的推理轨迹）。在一个包含超过 29,100 个唯一 DTCs 和 474 个错误模式的大规模汽车数据集上的评估表明，CAREP 能够自动、准确地发现未知的 EP 规则，优于仅使用 LLM 的基线模型，同时提供透明的因果解释。通过结合实用的因果发现和基于智能体的推理，CAREP 代表了迈向完全自动化故障诊断的一步，从而实现可扩展、可解释且具有成本效益的车辆维护。

title: R-HTN: Rebellious Online HTN Planning for Safety and Game AI
summary: We introduce online Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) agents whose behaviors are governed by a set of built-in directives \D. Like other agents that are capable of rebellion (i.e., {\it intelligent disobedience}), our agents will, under some conditions, not perform a user-assigned task and instead act in ways that do not meet a user's expectations. Our work combines three concepts: HTN planning, online planning, and the directives \D, which must be considered when performing user-assigned tasks. We investigate two agent variants: (1) a Nonadaptive agent that stops execution if it finds itself in violation of \D~ and (2) an Adaptive agent that, in the same situation, instead modifies its HTN plan to search for alternative ways to achieve its given task. We present R-HTN (for: Rebellious-HTN), a general algorithm for online HTN planning under directives \D. We evaluate R-HTN in two task domains where the agent must not violate some directives for safety reasons or as dictated by their personality traits. We found that R-HTN agents never violate directives, and aim to achieve the user-given goals if feasible though not necessarily as the user expected.
tldr: The paper introduces R-HTN, an online Hierarchical Task Network planning algorithm that allows agents to intelligently disobey user-assigned tasks based on pre-defined directives, aiming for safety and personality adherence. The algorithm is evaluated in two task domains, demonstrating the agent's ability to avoid directive violations while still pursuing user goals.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了一种在线分层任务网络规划算法R-HTN，该算法允许智能体根据预定义的指令智能地不服从用户分配的任务，以确保安全和个性化。该算法在两个任务领域进行了评估，展示了智能体避免违反指令，同时追求用户目标的能力。
summary_zh: 我们引入了在线分层任务网络 (HTN) 智能体，其行为受一组内置指令 \D 控制。与其他具有反抗能力的智能体（即，{\it 智能抗命}）类似，我们的智能体在某些情况下将不会执行用户分配的任务，而是采取不符合用户期望的行动。我们的工作结合了三个概念：HTN 规划、在线规划以及执行用户分配任务时必须考虑的指令 \D。我们研究了两种智能体变体：（1）非自适应智能体，如果在发现自身违反 \D 时停止执行；（2）自适应智能体，在相同情况下，会修改其 HTN 计划，从而寻找替代方法来实现给定的任务。我们提出了 R-HTN（意为：反叛-HTN），一种在指令 \D 下进行在线 HTN 规划的通用算法。我们在两个任务领域对 R-HTN 进行了评估，在这两个领域中，智能体不得违反某些指令，因为它们与安全性有关或由其人格特质决定。我们发现 R-HTN 智能体从未违反指令，并在可行的情况下努力实现用户设定的目标，即使不一定按照用户期望的方式实现。

title: Interacted Planes Reveal 3D Line Mapping
summary: 3D line mapping from multi-view RGB images provides a compact and structured visual representation of scenes. We study the problem from a physical and topological perspective: a 3D line most naturally emerges as the edge of a finite 3D planar patch. We present LiP-Map, a line-plane joint optimization framework that explicitly models learnable line and planar primitives. This coupling enables accurate and detailed 3D line mapping while maintaining strong efficiency (typically completing a reconstruction in 3 to 5 minutes per scene). LiP-Map pioneers the integration of planar topology into 3D line mapping, not by imposing pairwise coplanarity constraints but by explicitly constructing interactions between plane and line primitives, thus offering a principled route toward structured reconstruction in man-made environments. On more than 100 scenes from ScanNetV2, ScanNet++, Hypersim, 7Scenes, and Tanks\&Temple, LiP-Map improves both accuracy and completeness over state-of-the-art methods. Beyond line mapping quality, LiP-Map significantly advances line-assisted visual localization, establishing strong performance on 7Scenes. Our code is released at https://github.com/calmke/LiPMAP for reproducible research.
tldr: This paper introduces LiP-Map, a novel framework for 3D line mapping from multi-view images that explicitly models the interactions between learnable line and planar primitives, improving accuracy, completeness, and visual localization performance. The code is released for reproducibility.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 LiP-Map，一个用于多视图图像三维线映射的新框架，它显式地建模了可学习的线和平面图元之间的交互作用，从而提高了精度、完整性和视觉定位性能，并发布可复现的代码。
summary_zh: 从多视角RGB图像进行3D线映射提供了一种紧凑且结构化的场景视觉表示。我们从物理和拓扑的角度研究这个问题：一条3D线最自然地产生于一个有限3D平面片的边缘。我们提出了LiP-Map，一个明确地建模可学习的线和平面基元的线-面联合优化框架。这种耦合实现了精确和细致的3D线映射，同时保持了强大的效率（通常完成一个场景的重建需要3到5分钟）。LiP-Map率先将平面拓扑集成到3D线映射中，并非通过施加成对共面约束，而是通过显式地构建平面和线基元之间的交互，从而为在人造环境中进行结构化重建提供了一条原则性的途径。在来自ScanNetV2、ScanNet++、Hypersim、7Scenes和Tanks\&Temple的100多个场景中，LiP-Map在准确性和完整性方面都优于最先进的方法。除了线映射质量，LiP-Map显著提升了线辅助视觉定位，在7Scenes上建立了强大的性能。我们的代码已在https://github.com/calmke/LiPMAP上发布，以便进行可重复的研究。

title: FUSE-Flow: Scalable Real-Time Multi-View Point Cloud Reconstruction Using Confidence
summary: Real-time multi-view point cloud reconstruction is a core problem in 3D vision and immersive perception, with wide applications in VR, AR, robotic navigation, digital twins, and computer interaction. Despite advances in multi-camera systems and high-resolution depth sensors, fusing large-scale multi-view depth observations into high-quality point clouds under strict real-time constraints remains challenging. Existing methods relying on voxel-based fusion, temporal accumulation, or global optimization suffer from high computational complexity, excessive memory usage, and limited scalability, failing to simultaneously achieve real-time performance, reconstruction quality, and multi-camera extensibility. We propose FUSE-Flow, a frame-wise, stateless, and linearly scalable point cloud streaming reconstruction framework. Each frame independently generates point cloud fragments, fused via two weights, measurement confidence and 3D distance consistency to suppress noise while preserving geometric details. For large-scale multi-camera efficiency, we introduce an adaptive spatial hashing-based weighted aggregation method: 3D space is adaptively partitioned by local point cloud density, representative points are selected per cell, and weighted fusion is performed to handle both sparse and dense regions. With GPU parallelization, FUSE-Flow achieves high-throughput, low-latency point cloud generation and fusion with linear complexity. Experiments demonstrate that the framework improves reconstruction stability and geometric fidelity in overlapping, depth-discontinuous, and dynamic scenes, while maintaining real-time frame rates on modern GPUs, verifying its effectiveness, robustness, and scalability.
tldr: This paper presents FUSE-Flow, a scalable real-time multi-view point cloud reconstruction framework that uses confidence and adaptive spatial hashing for efficient and high-quality fusion of depth observations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了FUSE-Flow，一个可扩展的实时多视角点云重建框架，它利用置信度和自适应空间哈希来实现高效且高质量的深度观测融合。
summary_zh: 实时多视角点云重建是三维视觉和沉浸式感知领域的核心问题，在虚拟现实、增强现实、机器人导航、数字孪生以及计算机交互等领域有着广泛的应用。尽管多相机系统和高分辨率深度传感器取得了进展，但在严格的实时约束下，将大规模多视角深度观测融合为高质量点云仍然具有挑战性。现有方法依赖于体素融合、时序累积或全局优化，但存在计算复杂度高、内存占用过多以及可扩展性有限等问题，无法同时实现实时性能、重建质量和多相机可扩展性。我们提出了FUSE-Flow，一个逐帧、无状态且线性可扩展的点云流式重建框架。每帧独立生成点云片段，通过测量置信度和3D距离一致性这两个权重融合，以抑制噪声并保留几何细节。为了实现大规模多相机效率，我们引入了一种基于自适应空间哈希的加权聚合方法：3D空间根据局部点云密度进行自适应划分，每个单元格选择代表点，并执行加权融合以处理稀疏和密集区域。通过GPU并行化，FUSE-Flow以线性复杂度实现了高吞吐量、低延迟的点云生成和融合。实验表明，该框架提高了在重叠、深度不连续和动态场景中的重建稳定性和几何保真度，同时在现代GPU上保持了实时帧率，验证了其有效性、鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: TRACE: Scalable Amortized Causal Discovery from Single Sequences via Autoregressive Density Estimation
summary: We study causal discovery from a single observed sequence of discrete events generated by a stochastic process, as encountered in vehicle logs, manufacturing systems, or patient trajectories. This regime is particularly challenging due to the absence of repeated samples, high dimensionality, and long-range temporal dependencies of the single observation during inference. We introduce TRACE, a scalable framework that repurposes autoregressive models as pretrained density estimators for conditional mutual information estimation. TRACE infers the summary causal graph between event types in a sequence, scaling linearly with the event vocabulary and supporting delayed causal effects, while being fully parallel on GPUs. We establish its theoretical identifiability under imperfect autoregressive models. Experiments demonstrate robust performance across different baselines and varying vocabulary sizes including an application to root-cause analysis in vehicle diagnostics with over 29,100 event types.
tldr: TRACE introduces a scalable framework for causal discovery from single event sequences using autoregressive models for conditional mutual information estimation, demonstrated on vehicle diagnostics with a large event vocabulary.
tldr_zh: TRACE 提出了一个可扩展的框架，用于从单个事件序列中进行因果发现，该框架使用自回归模型进行条件互信息估计，并在具有大量事件词汇的车辆诊断中得到验证。
summary_zh: 我们研究从由随机过程生成的离散事件的单一观测序列中进行因果发现，这种序列常见于车辆日志、制造系统或患者轨迹中。由于缺乏重复样本、高维度以及推断期间单次观测的长程时间依赖性，因此该场景极具挑战性。我们提出TRACE，一个可扩展的框架，它将自回归模型重新用作条件互信息估计的预训练密度估计器。TRACE推断序列中事件类型之间的概括因果图，随事件词汇量线性扩展，并支持延迟因果效应，同时能在GPU上完全并行化。我们证明了其在不完美的自回归模型下的理论可识别性。实验表明，与不同的基线和不同词汇量相比，TRACE表现出稳健的性能，其中包括一个在具有超过29,100种事件类型的车辆诊断中进行根本原因分析的应用。

title: Optimal Decision-Making Based on Prediction Sets
summary: Prediction sets can wrap around any ML model to cover unknown test outcomes with a guaranteed probability. Yet, it remains unclear how to use them optimally for downstream decision-making. Here, we propose a decision-theoretic framework that seeks to minimize the expected loss (risk) against a worst-case distribution consistent with the prediction set's coverage guarantee. We first characterize the minimax optimal policy for a fixed prediction set, showing that it balances the worst-case loss inside the set with a penalty for potential losses outside the set. Building on this, we derive the optimal prediction set construction that minimizes the resulting robust risk subject to a coverage constraint. Finally, we introduce Risk-Optimal Conformal Prediction (ROCP), a practical algorithm that targets these risk-minimizing sets while maintaining finite-sample distribution-free marginal coverage. Empirical evaluations on medical diagnosis and safety-critical decision-making tasks demonstrate that ROCP reduces critical mistakes compared to baselines, particularly when out-of-set errors are costly.
tldr: This paper presents a decision-theoretic framework for constructing prediction sets that minimize the worst-case expected loss, along with a practical algorithm, ROCP, which shows promising results in medical diagnosis and safety-critical decision-making.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个决策理论框架，用于构建最小化最坏情况下预期损失的预测集，并提出了一个实用的算法ROCP，在医疗诊断和安全关键决策任务中显示出有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 预测集可以包裹任何机器学习模型，以保证的概率覆盖未知的测试结果。然而，如何以最佳方式将其用于下游决策仍然不明确。在此，我们提出了一个决策理论框架，旨在最小化预期损失（风险），该损失是针对与预测集的覆盖保证相一致的最坏情况分布而言的。我们首先针对固定的预测集表征了极小极大最优策略，表明它平衡了集合内部的最坏情况损失与集合外部潜在损失的惩罚。在此基础上，我们推导了最优预测集构建方法，该方法在满足覆盖约束的条件下，最小化所产生的鲁棒风险。最后，我们引入了风险最优共形预测（ROCP），这是一种实用算法，旨在寻找这些风险最小化的集合，同时保持有限样本的无分布边际覆盖率。在医疗诊断和安全关键决策任务上的实证评估表明，与基线方法相比，ROCP减少了关键错误，尤其是在集合外错误代价高昂时。

title: Meanshift Shape Formation Control Using Discrete Mass Distribution
summary: The density-distribution method has recently become a promising paradigm owing to its adaptability to variations in swarm size. However, existing studies face practical challenges in achieving complex shape representation and decentralized implementation. This motivates us to develop a fully decentralized, distribution-based control strategy with the dual capability of forming complex shapes and adapting to swarm-size variations. Specifically, we first propose a discrete mass-distribution function defined over a set of sample points to model swarm formation. In contrast to the continuous density-distribution method, our model eliminates the requirement for defining continuous density functions-a task that is difficult for complex shapes. Second, we design a decentralized meanshift control law to coordinate the swarm's global distribution to fit the sample-point distribution by feeding back mass estimates. The mass estimates for all sample points are achieved by the robots in a decentralized manner via the designed mass estimator. It is shown that the mass estimates of the sample points can asymptotically converge to the true global values. To validate the proposed strategy, we conduct comprehensive simulations and real-world experiments to evaluate the efficiency of complex shape formation and adaptability to swarm-size variations.
tldr: This paper presents a decentralized meanshift control strategy using discrete mass distribution for robot swarms to form complex shapes and adapt to swarm size variations, validated through simulations and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用离散质量分布的去中心化均值漂移控制策略，用于机器人集群形成复杂形状并适应集群规模变化，并通过仿真和实际实验验证了其有效性。
summary_zh: 密度分布方法由于其对群体规模变化的适应性，最近成为一种有前景的范式。然而，现有的研究在实现复杂形状表示和去中心化实施方面面临着实际挑战。这促使我们开发一种完全去中心化的、基于分布的控制策略，该策略同时具备形成复杂形状和适应群体规模变化的能力。具体而言，我们首先提出一种定义在样本点集合上的离散质量分布函数来建模群体队形。与连续密度分布方法相比，我们的模型消除了定义连续密度函数的需求，而对于复杂形状来说，这项任务是困难的。其次，我们设计了一种去中心化的均值漂移控制律，通过反馈质量估计值来协调群体的全局分布以适应样本点分布。所有样本点的质量估计值由机器人通过设计的质量估计器以去中心化的方式实现。结果表明，样本点的质量估计值可以渐近收敛到真实的全局值。为了验证所提出的策略，我们进行了全面的仿真和真实环境实验，以评估复杂形状形成和群体规模变化的适应性效率。

title: Transforming Vehicle Diagnostics: A Multimodal Approach to Error Patterns Prediction
summary: Accurately diagnosing and predicting vehicle malfunctions is crucial for maintenance and safety in the automotive industry. While modern diagnostic systems primarily rely on sequences of vehicular Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) registered in On-Board Diagnostic (OBD) systems, they often overlook valuable contextual information such as raw sensory data (e.g., temperature, humidity, and pressure). This contextual data, crucial for domain experts to classify vehicle failures, introduces unique challenges due to its complexity and the noisy nature of real-world data. This paper presents BiCarFormer: the first multimodal approach to multi-label sequence classification of error codes into error patterns that integrates DTC sequences and environmental conditions. BiCarFormer is a bidirectional Transformer model tailored for vehicle event sequences, employing embedding fusions and a co-attention mechanism to capture the relationships between diagnostic codes and environmental data. Experimental results on a challenging real-world automotive dataset with 22,137 error codes and 360 error patterns demonstrate that our approach significantly improves classification performance compared to models that rely solely on DTC sequences and traditional sequence models. This work highlights the importance of incorporating contextual environmental information for more accurate and robust vehicle diagnostics, hence reducing maintenance costs and enhancing automation processes in the automotive industry.
tldr: The paper introduces BiCarFormer, a multimodal bidirectional Transformer model that integrates DTC sequences and environmental data for enhanced vehicle error pattern prediction, demonstrating significant improvement over DTC-only and traditional sequence models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BiCarFormer，一种多模态双向Transformer模型，它整合了DTC序列和环境数据，以增强车辆错误模式的预测。实验表明，该模型比仅使用DTC的模型和传统序列模型有显著改进。
summary_zh: 准确诊断和预测车辆故障对于汽车行业的维护和安全至关重要。虽然现代诊断系统主要依赖于车载诊断（OBD）系统中记录的车辆诊断故障码（DTC）序列，但它们往往忽略了宝贵的上下文信息，例如原始传感器数据（例如，温度、湿度和压力）。这种上下文数据对于领域专家对车辆故障进行分类至关重要，但由于其复杂性和真实世界数据的噪声性质，带来了独特的挑战。本文提出了BiCarFormer：第一个将DTC序列和环境条件相结合，用于将错误代码多标签序列分类为错误模式的多模态方法。 BiCarFormer是为车辆事件序列量身定制的双向Transformer模型，采用嵌入融合和协同注意力机制来捕获诊断代码和环境数据之间的关系。在具有22,137个错误代码和360个错误模式的具有挑战性的真实世界汽车数据集上的实验结果表明，与仅依赖于DTC序列和传统序列模型的模型相比，我们的方法显著提高了分类性能。这项工作强调了结合上下文环境信息对于更准确和稳健的车辆诊断的重要性，从而降低了维护成本并加强了汽车行业的自动化流程。

title: TF-Lane: Traffic Flow Module for Robust Lane Perception
summary: Autonomous driving systems require robust lane perception capabilities, yet existing vision-based detection methods suffer significant performance degradation when visual sensors provide insufficient cues, such as in occluded or lane-missing scenarios. While some approaches incorporate high-definition maps as supplementary information, these solutions face challenges of high subscription costs and limited real-time performance. To address these limitations, we explore an innovative information source: traffic flow, which offers real-time capabilities without additional costs. This paper proposes a TrafficFlow-aware Lane perception Module (TFM) that effectively extracts real-time traffic flow features and seamlessly integrates them with existing lane perception algorithms. This solution originated from real-world autonomous driving conditions and was subsequently validated on open-source algorithms and datasets. Extensive experiments on four mainstream models and two public datasets (Nuscenes and OpenLaneV2) using standard evaluation metrics show that TFM consistently improves performance, achieving up to +4.1% mAP gain on the Nuscenes dataset.
tldr: The paper introduces a traffic flow-aware module (TFM) to improve lane perception in autonomous driving systems by leveraging real-time traffic flow information, achieving better performance than existing vision-based methods without relying on expensive HD maps. They demonstrated improved mAP on Nuscenes and OpenLaneV2 datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个交通流量感知模块 (TFM)，通过利用实时交通流量信息来改进自动驾驶系统中的车道感知，与现有的基于视觉的方法相比，实现了更好的性能，并且不依赖于昂贵的高清地图。他们在 Nuscenes 和 OpenLaneV2 数据集上展示了改进的 mAP。
summary_zh:
摘要：
自动驾驶系统需要强大的车道感知能力，然而，现有的基于视觉的检测方法在视觉传感器提供的信息不足时，例如在遮挡或车道缺失的场景中，性能会显著下降。虽然一些方法整合了高精度地图作为补充信息，但这些解决方案面临订阅成本高和实时性能有限的挑战。为了解决这些局限性，我们探索了一种创新的信息来源：交通流，它提供了实时能力且无需额外成本。本文提出了一种交通流感知车道感知模块（TFM），该模块有效地提取实时交通流特征，并将其与现有的车道感知算法无缝集成。该解决方案源于真实的自动驾驶条件，并在开源算法和数据集上进行了验证。使用标准评估指标，在四种主流模型和两个公共数据集（Nuscenes和OpenLaneV2）上进行的大量实验表明，TFM能够持续改进性能，在Nuscenes数据集上实现了高达+4.1%的mAP增益。
